theme: Light theme default with heavy glassmorphism, depth, and dark/slate accents. Modern Corporate Hospitality OS.
archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Archetype 5 (Luxury) Hybrid with VisionOS spatial depth.
design_principles: Spatial Depth: Use heavy glassmorphism (12-24px backdrop blur), Z-index layering, and subtle noise overlays to mimic an OS environment.
High Performance: 60 FPS hardware-accelerated animations using Framer Motion (fade, scale, blur, slide).
Enterprise Density: Asymmetric, information-dense layouts suitable for heavy operational load without feeling cluttered.
Interaction Feedback: Micro-animations on every interaction, hover glows, card tilts, mouse-reactive neon highlights.
Calm During Peak Hours: Use luxury accents (Gold) and calming primary (Deep Slate, Emerald) to reduce cognitive overload for staff.

rules: No font below 14px for interactive elements.
Headings (32px+) MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Overlines and Labels (12px) MUST be uppercase with wide spacing (tracking-widest) and medium/bold weights.
Font weights: Light (300) for display/elegance, Medium (500) for body, Bold (700) for highlights/CTAs.

surface_treatments: Floating Windows: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_32px_64px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] rounded-2xl.
Dock/Sidebar: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/60 shadow-lg border border-white/50.
Cards (Inner OS): Flat solid background (bg-white) with 1px border-slate-200, hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all.

boot_screen.layout: Full screen overlay, absolute center logo.
boot_screen.animation: JARVIS/VisionOS inspired sequence. Abstract fluid dark slate/emerald background. Central logo draws its path (SVG line animation), glows, and rapidly scales up/fades out into the OS desktop.

login_screen.layout: Split layout or centered glass card over luxury hotel lobby background image.
login_screen.features: Role selection (Owner/Manager/Waiter) via large hover-tilt cards. Minimal input fields with glassmorphism.

os_shell.desktop: Full viewport height. Background is a premium abstract or clean gradient.
os_shell.top_bar: macOS style thin bar at top (32px height). Contains global OS status, Clock, Weather, WiFi, and AI insights trigger.
os_shell.sidebar: 280px width, Windows 11 aesthetic. Can be collapsed. Contains primary navigation.
os_shell.dock: Floating bottom center, macOS style. Contains currently active apps/windows.
os_shell.floating_windows: framer-motion powered draggable and resizable windows. Have macOS-style traffic light dots (close, minimize, maximize) on the top left of the window header.

operations_dashboard.widgets: Active Tables, Kitchen Queue, Revenue, Orders, Reservations, Waiting Customers, Staff, Avg Service Time, Table Turnover. Use Chart.js (or Recharts) for rich data visuals.

kitchen_display_system_kds.layout: Kanban style or dense grid for high-speed readability.
kitchen_display_system_kds.cards: Status colored cards (Received: Slate, Preparing: Amber, Ready: Emerald, Delayed: Red). Includes timers that pulse if delayed. Large typography for kitchen staff visibility.

table_management.layout: Interactive visual floor map. Draggable tables, shape variations (round/square).
table_management.features: Occupancy heatmap overlay. Status indicators (Dirty, Reserved, VIP). Right-click/Long-press context menu for merge/split.

pos_interface.features: Quick category sidebar, large tap-to-add item cards, split billing sliding panel. High contrast text for fast readability.

command_palette.layout: Centered screen, heavy backdrop-blur-2xl. Slate-900 background for the palette itself with glowing Cyan highlights on selected items.
command_palette.features: Quick search for tables, menu items, guests, settings.

notification_center.layout: Slide-in panel from the right side (Windows 11 style) or stacked floating toasts (Sonner).

ai_assistant.trigger: Floating JARVIS-style orb button or top-bar icon.
ai_assistant.features: Expanding side panel or floating window providing predictive text, busy hours, and inventory recommendations.

interactions: Hover Glow: Use radial gradients that follow mouse position (mouse-reactive neon) for premium cards.
Card Tilt: Subtle 3D tilt effect on role-selection or high-value widget cards.
Window Spawn: Scale up from 0.95 and fade in (opacity 0 to 1) with spring physics.

icons_and_assets.stroke_width: 1.5px to 2px, depending on size (clean and minimal).

login_background.description: Luxurious modern hotel lobby with architectural details and plush seating, providing a premium hospitality vibe.

os_desktop_wallpaper.description: Abstract, vibrant emerald and cyan ink swirling underwater. Provides a VisionOS/macOS-style deep, calm desktop background.

empty_state_illustration.description: Minimalist modern cafe interior. Perfect for empty states or placeholder visuals for the POS/Table screens.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, chart.js (or recharts), tailwind-merge, clsx.
Implement a BootSequence component that renders first, then transitions to the LoginScreen, then into the OSDesktop layout.
The OSDesktop should manage a state array of 'openWindows' to render Draggable floating windows over the desktop wallpaper.
Apply `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70` extensively on windows and panels. Do not use opaque solid whites for OS floating elements to maintain the VisionOS aesthetic.
Strictly follow the color palette. Ensure the Inter font is applied globally.
Use data-testid on every button, input, and draggable window for testing compliance.
